summary: Completed testing of 1688 Image Search feature. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Image Search tab visible, search returns 697 products with Factory badges, pagination works, Import button triggers batch import successfully.

issues: First product card shows 'No Image' placeholder - this is expected when image URL fails to load

critical_code_review_comments: Image Search API correctly uses TMAPI endpoint /1688/search/image
Products include all required fields: product_id, title, price, image, shop_name, is_factory
Import button correctly calls batch-import API with product_id
Pagination implemented correctly with Previous/Next buttons
seed_data_creation: Product 723133366276 was imported during testing via Image Search Import button
context_for_next_testing_agent: Image Search feature fully tested. Test image URL: https://cbu01.alicdn.com/img/ibank/O1CN01uLe8MH2FQLh5yMerK_!!3067528874-0-cib.jpg returns 697 products. All backend APIs working: POST /api/1688-scraper/image-search, POST /api/1688-scraper/batch-import. Frontend UI shows Image Search tab with search input, sort dropdown, search button, product grid with Factory badges, and pagination.

features_tested.1_image_search_api: PASS - POST /api/1688-scraper/image-search returns products with all required fields
features_tested.2_products_have_required_fields: PASS - product_id, title, price, image, shop_name all present
features_tested.3_image_search_tab_visible: PASS - Tab visible in Product Scraper page
features_tested.4_search_results_grid_with_factory_badge: PASS - Products display in grid with green Factory badges
features_tested.5_import_button_triggers_batch_import: PASS - Import button calls batch-import API successfully
features_tested.6_pagination_works: PASS - Previous/Next buttons navigate between pages

api_verification_summary.POST /api/1688-scraper/image-search: WORKING - Returns 697 products for test image
api_verification_summary.POST /api/1688-scraper/batch-import: WORKING - Returns job_id for importing products
